body1: ABT Consulting is a Cape Town-based operational efficiency and process improvement consultancy. I help small and medium businesses build the operational foundations they need to grow with confidence, improve efficiency, and protect profitability. Every engagement is tailored to your business, combining practical process improvement, clear documentation, and implementation support that delivers lasting results.
body2: I founded ABT Consulting on a simple belief: most businesses don't need to work harder; they need better ways of working. When the right processes, systems, and standards are in place, teams become more consistent, decisions become easier, and businesses become less dependent on any one person. That's what I help my clients achieve.
